channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WHEELS] Wheels India Recommends ₹9.14 Dividend; FY26 Results
item.description:
Wheels India Ltd's board has recommended a final dividend of ₹9.14 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The record date for the dividend is June 24, 2026. The 67th Annual General Meeting will be held on July 1, 2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, with revenue from operations at ₹5,098.35 Cr (Standalone) and ₹5,464.94 Cr (Consolidated).

  • Final dividend of ₹9.14 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend payment is June 24, 2026.
  • 67th AGM to be held on July 1, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Standalone revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹5,098.35 Cr.
  • Consolidated revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹5,464.94 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WHEELS INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SMSPHARMA] SMS Pharma Board Meeting on May 22, 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
SMS Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for the company's equity shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 24, 2026, reopening on May 25, 2026.

  • SMS Pharma's board will meet on May 22, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The board will consider recommending a dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 24, 2026, reopening on May 25, 2026.
  • Meeting to discuss standalone and consolidated financial statements for Q4 and FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMS PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LAXMIPATI] Laxmipati Engineering Board Meeting on May 26, 2026
item.description:
Laxmipati Engineering Works Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 26, 2026, to consider and approve the Standalone Audited Financial Results along with the Audit report for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares is closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled on May 26, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Standalone Audited Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026, to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after results declaration.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Surat, Gujarat.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Laxmipati Engineering Works Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AUROPHARMA] Aurobindo Pharma's Curateq Gets CDSCO Nod for Bevacizumab Biosimilar
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Curateq Biologics Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Aurobindo Pharma Ltd, has received marketing authorization from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization (CDSCO) for Bevqolva®, a bevacizumab biosimilar. The authorization, granted under Form CT 23, allows CuraTeQ to manufacture and market Bevqolva® in 100 mg/4mL and 400 mg/16 mL vial presentations from its Hyderabad facility. Bevqolva® is indicated for metastatic carcinoma of the colon or rectum.

  • Curateq Biologics receives CDSCO authorization for Bevqolva®.
  • Bevqolva® is a bevacizumab biosimilar indicated for metastatic carcinoma.
  • Manufacturing and marketing permitted from CuraTeQ's Hyderabad facility.
  • Bevqolva® will be available in 100 mg/4mL and 400 mg/16 mL vial presentations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUROBINDO PHARMA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ACE] Action Construction to Consider FY26 Dividend on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Action Construction Equipment Ltd (ACE) announced that its Board of Directors will meet on May 20, 2026, to consider and recommend a dividend on equity shares for the financial year 2025-26. The board will also consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will re-open on May 23, 2026.

  • Action Construction board to consider FY26 dividend.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 will be reviewed.
  • Trading window re-opens on May 23, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACTION CONSTRUCTION EQUIPMENT LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IRBINVIT] IRB InvIT Fund NAV at ₹81.26 Per Unit as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
IRB InvIT Fund has released its annual full valuation report for assets for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. According to the valuation report by KPMG Valuation Services LLP, the Net Asset Value (NAV) at fair value per unit is ₹81.26 as of March 31, 2026. The total assets are valued at ₹1,92,811.58 million, liabilities at ₹88,668.57 million, resulting in net assets of ₹1,04,143.00 million. The valuation is based on traffic reports from GMD Consultants and complies with SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014.

  • IRB InvIT Fund reports NAV of ₹81.26 per unit as of March 31, 2026.
  • Total assets valued at ₹1,92,811.58 million; net assets at ₹1,04,143.00 million.
  • KPMG Valuation Services LLP issued the valuation report on May 15, 2026.
  • Valuation complies with SEBI InvIT Regulations, 2014.
  • Traffic reports from GMD Consultants were used for project SPV valuation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRB InvIT Fund | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SYMPHONY] Symphony Ltd FY26 Revenue Down 28% YoY to ₹1,131 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Symphony Ltd reported a 28% YoY decrease in consolidated revenue for FY26, reaching ₹1,131 crore. Standalone revenue also declined by 35% to ₹765 crore. The company's EBITDA margin contracted, attributed to operating deleverage. The board has proposed a final dividend of ₹5 per share. The company is undertaking a balance sheet reset for its Australian operations, including impairments of ₹259 crore at the consolidated level. Symphony will acquire CTPL’s IPRs for ~₹23 crore and Bonaire USA LLC for ~₹30 crore.

  • Symphony's FY26 consolidated revenue decreased by 28% YoY to ₹1,131 crore.
  • The Board proposed a final dividend of ₹5 per share for FY26.
  • Australia business faces reset with ₹259 crore consolidated impairment.
  • Company to acquire CTPL's IPRs for ~₹23 crore and Bonaire USA LLC for ~₹30 crore.
  • BISP contributed 49% of FY26 consolidated revenue, advancing strategic diversification.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Symphony Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KSHITIJ] Manglam Global: Deviation Statement for March 2026 Quarter
item.description:
Manglam Global Corporations Ltd has filed a statement of deviation and variation for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The company raised ₹68476000 through preferential issues on January 5, 2026. The filing indicates that there was no deviation in the use of funds raised. The funds were allocated for working capital (₹60000000) and general corporate purposes (₹7976000), with no funds utilized during the quarter. The audit committee has reviewed and approved the statement, and the auditors confirmed no deviation from the initial purpose of the fund raise.

  • Manglam Global reports no deviation in fund utilization for Q4 2026.
  • ₹68476000 was raised via preferential issue on January 5, 2026.
  • Funds allocated for working capital and general corporate purposes.
  • Audit committee approved the statement; auditors confirmed no deviation.
  • No funds were utilized during the reported quarter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kshitij Investments Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [AMBER] Amber Enterprises FY26 Revenue Up 22% YoY to ₹12,186 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amber Enterprises India Ltd. announced its audited financial results for FY26, reporting a revenue of ₹12,186 Cr, a 22% increase YoY. Operating EBITDA grew by 22% to ₹970 Cr. Adjusted PAT reached ₹338 Cr, up 22% YoY, excluding exceptional items. The company expanded its Electronics Division through strategic stakes in Shogini Technoarts, Power-One, and Unitronics. It also secured approvals under the ECMS scheme and land allotments for new manufacturing facilities. The Consumer Durables division grew by 14%, the Electronics Division by 49%, and the Railway Sub-systems & Defense division by 19%.

  • FY26 revenue reached ₹12,186 Cr, a 22% increase year-over-year.
  • Operating EBITDA grew by 22% to ₹970 Cr for FY26.
  • Adjusted PAT increased by 22% to ₹338 Cr for FY26.
  • Strategic investments made in Shogini Technoarts, Power-One and Unitronics.
  • Railway Sub-systems & Defense division order book at ₹2,600+ Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amber Enterprises India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [DRREDDY] Dr. Reddy's Launches Generic Semaglutide Injection in Canada
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd. has launched its generic Semaglutide Injection in Canada, following the Notice of Compliance (NOC) received from Health Canada on April 28th, 2026. Dr. Reddy’s is among the first companies to introduce a generic Semaglutide Injection in the Canadian market. The injection is indicated for the once-weekly treatment of adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus, to improve glycemic control in combination with diet and exercise. It is supplied as a sterile solution for subcutaneous injection in pre-filled pens.

  • Dr. Reddy's launches generic Semaglutide Injection in Canada after Health Canada approval.
  • Canada is the first G7 country to authorize generic Semaglutide Injection.
  • The injection is for treating type 2 diabetes in adults, improving glycemic control.
  • Semaglutide Injection is available in 2 mg/pen and 4 mg/pen strengths.
  • This launch builds on the momentum of their recent launch in India under the brand name Obeda®.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DR.REDDY'S LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: New Launch
